_comment: Volmageddon — VIX 10→37 spike on 2018-02-05. Extreme z-score against a calm pre-event window.

expected_band.rationale_pending_trader: SRS CLS-001 ECDF: VIX median=11.08, |deviation|=|37.32-11.08|=26.24. All 20 historical deviations are ≤ 26.24 (window range spans only ~11 to ~12), so ecdf_rank=20, severity=20/20=1.00. This is the definitive extreme event — VIX went to 37 from a completely calm regime. The current tanh implementation (~0.88) understates this by design (it caps severity below 1.0 until z exceeds ~6). ECDF produces 1.00 correctly: this is the most extreme reading in the window.
